source_definition: Awarded to any move in which you catch (stall/delay) the footbag on either your foot or part of your leg.
key_finding: Universal terminal flag in operational notation. Each operational form ends with [DEL]

source_definition: Awarded when you circle or cross the footbag with your leg.
key_finding: Universal dex-action flag. Each dex segment in operational notation includes [DEX]

source_definition: You get this Add when you use any surface of the body besides the toes insteps outsteps and knees.
key_finding: NEW INSIGHT: Modern operational notation uses unusual-surface tokens (PINCH DRAGON FRIGIDOSIS per footbag-sets audit) but doesn't typically include explicit [UNS] flag. Modern doctrine may have absorbed [UNS] into surface tokens themselves

source_definition: Awarded to any move which involves a spin jump or twist of your body.
key_finding: Universal body-action flag for SPIN BOD elements. Each spin/jump/twist segment includes [BOD]

source_definition: Awarded to any move which involves a kick or delay done on the opposite side of your body.
key_finding: Universal cross-body terminal flag. Used on clipper-class terminals (CLIP > ... > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL])
